archimate:ApplicationInterface.name: eTendering
archimate:ApplicationInterface.documentation:
Definition: eTendering refers to the capability of providing access to specific functionalities related to tendering processes through web-based APIs (Application Programming Interfaces). This allows external systems or applications to interact with the eTendering platform to perform tasks such as retrieving tendering information, submitting bids, or querying tender results.
Source: Publications Office of the European Union
Source reference: https://ted.europa.eu/TED/main/HomePage.do
LOST view: TVA-API Enablers [Motivation]
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ETenderingApplicationInterface
ABB name: egovera:ETenderingApplicationInterface
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ETenderingApplicationInterface
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalApplication
Specialises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/WebServiceApplicationInterface

properties.value: eTendering refers to the capability of providing access to specific functionalities related to tendering processes through web-based APIs (Application Programming Interfaces). This allows external systems or applications to interact with the eTendering platform to perform tasks such as retrieving tendering information, submitting bids, or querying tender results.
Publications Office of the European Union
